data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for re-signing when form version changes.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'Re-sign requirement when form version changes', but there is no evidence provided that confirms the existence or functionality of this requirement in the current saga run. The prior steps do not address this requirement, indicating a lack of necessary evidence to assert a definitive conclusion. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive.
gaps: No evidence of re-sign requirement when form version changes being implemented or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
